description: Celebrate the most special woman in your life with our floral-themed email template, designed to perfectly express your love for your mom. Ideal for those looking to send a heartfelt Mother’s Day message, this template features a beautiful blend of pink hues and flower decorations. It's also perfect for businesses promoting seasonal products or services dedicated to moms. The template effortlessly incorporates elements of holiday, plant, and gift themes, making it versatile for various events. Whether you're showcasing a promotion or just sending a personal message, this email template will ensure your sentiments are beautifully conveyed. So, why wait? Let your love bloom with our floral email template.
short_description: Celebrate Mother's Day with our floral-themed email template. Perfect for personal messages or promoting seasonal products and services. Express your love with beautiful pink hues and flower decorations. Let your love bloom with our versatile template.

designer.description:
Hi! I’m Manuela Langella and I’m a Surface Pattern Designer & Illustrator.
I started working in 2003 in the field of Web & Graphic Design, I have been a lecturer and I am currently a freelancer, working with various clients around the world.

Since 2013 I have been passionate about Vector Illustration by using Illustrator and several apps for iPad, such as Adobe Draw, Vectornator, Procreate.

Finally I discovered the world of Surface Pattern Design, which I deeply fell in love with.

Seeing your own designs on fabric really does have a different effect than anything I’ve done so far. I love what I do!
